apihelp-antispoof-summary: Ku tijaabi magaca isticmaalaha baarista habaynta ee ka hortagga is daba marinta.
apihelp-antispoof-param-username: Magaca isticmaalaha ee lagu tijaabinayo ka hortagga is daba marinta.
apihelp-antispoof-example-1: Ku tijaabi magaca isticmaalaha "Foo" ka hortagga is daba-marinta
apihelp-createaccount-param-ignoreantisp: Iska indho tir baarista ka hortagga is daba marinta (waxay u baahan tahay xuquuqda gacan sare ku gudbista ka hortagga is daba marinta).
